title: OVERRUN
description: OVERRUN is a Minecraft 1.20.1 Fabric modpack featuring extreme world generation, hundreds of new biomes and structures, and overhauled mobs for epic exploration.
body:
# Overrun

**A complete overhaul of Minecraft's world generation, structures, mobs, and exploration experience.**

### I haven't released the server version, working on it though, it'll be out by the end of this week hopefully

## Overview

Overrun transforms Minecraft into an expansive adventure where every biome, structure, and creature has been reimagined. This isn't just another modpack—it's a complete reinvention of the Minecraft world that pushes the boundaries of exploration and survival.

## 🌍 World Generation & Biomes

Prepare for a world unlike anything you've seen before. Overrun combines the best world generation mods to create diverse, breathtaking landscapes:

- **Tectonic** provides realistic, large-scale terrain generation with towering mountain ranges and deep valleys
- **Terralith** adds 100+ stunning vanilla-style biomes that feel like they should have always been in the game
- **Biomes O' Plenty** introduces fantastical biomes filled with unique flora and fauna
- **Regions Unexplored** brings even more biome variety with a focus on visual spectacle
- **Oh The Biomes We've Gone** pushes biome diversity to the extreme
- **Geophilic** enhances vanilla biomes with improved generation
- **Lithostitched** ensures all these biome mods work together seamlessly
- **Oh The Trees You'll Grow** adds varied tree generation across biomes

### Enhanced Dimensions
- **Better End** and **Nullscape** completely overhaul the End dimension with new biomes and terrain
- **Better Nether** and **Bygone Nether** transform the Nether into a dangerous, beautiful hellscape
- **Incendium** adds challenging volcanic biomes to the Nether
- **BCLib** provides the foundation for these dimension overhauls

## 🏰 Structures & Dungeons

The world is packed with structures to discover at every turn:

### Major Structure Overhauls
- **When Dungeons Arise** - Massive, sprawling dungeons that will test your skills
- **Dungeons and Taverns** - Medieval-themed structures with loot and danger
- **Towns and Towers** - Expansive villages and imposing towers
- **ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village** - Completely redesigned village generation

### YUNG's Better Structures Suite
Every vanilla structure has been rebuilt from the ground up:
- Better Desert Temples, Jungle Temples, Witch Huts
- Better Dungeons, Mineshafts, Strongholds
- Better Ocean Monuments, Nether Fortresses
- Better End Islands
- Plus YUNG's Bridges and Extras for even more variety

### Additional Structures
- **Repurposed Structures** - Variants of vanilla structures in new biomes
- **Additional Structures** - More variety in structure generation
- **Structory & Structory: Towers** - Unique small to medium structures
- **The Lost Castle** - Mysterious castle ruins to explore
- **Moog's Voyager Structures & End Structures** - Exploration-focused builds
- **Philip's Ruins** - Ancient ruins scattered across the landscape
- **Explorations** & **Explorify** - Even more structures to discover
- **Formations (Overworld & Nether)** - Natural geological formations
- **SparseStructures** - Ensures structures feel appropriately rare

## 👹 Mobs & Creatures

The world is alive with new and overhauled creatures:

### Mob Overhauls
- **Creeper Overhaul** - Biome-specific creeper variants
- **Enderman Overhaul** - Reimagined endermen with new behaviors
- **More Mob Variants** - Visual variety for existing mobs
- **Nyf's Spiders** - More realistic and terrifying spiders
- **Zombie Awareness** - Zombies that hunt you intelligently (requires CoroUtil)

### New Creatures
- **Naturalist** - Real-world animals that blend seamlessly with Minecraft
- **Friends & Foes** - New mobs from scrapped Minecraft mob votes
- **Ecologics** - Biome-specific creatures and ecosystems
- **Aquamirae** - Dangerous aquatic creatures and ocean content

### Villages & NPCs
- **Guard Villagers** - Villagers that actually defend their homes
- **Villagers Plus** - Enhanced villager professions and behaviors
- **Villages & Pillages** - Improved village and pillager mechanics
- **Illager Invasion** - More dangerous illager encounters
- **Friends & Foes - Beekeeper Hut** - New village structure with beekeepers

### Boss Encounters
- **True Ending: Ender Dragon Overhaul** - A challenging, reimagined dragon fight
- **Deeper and Darker** - New dimension with powerful bosses

## 🚀 Exploration & Adventure

### Navigation & Discovery
- **Nature's Compass** - Find any biome
- **Explorer's Compass** - Locate structures
- **Waystones** - Set up fast travel networks
- **Better Archeology** - Expanded archeology system

### Space Exploration
- **Ad Astra** - Build rockets and explore space, adding planets and space stations

## 🍲 Farming & Food

- **Farmer's Delight** (core mod + Fabric port) - Expanded cooking and farming
- **Chef's Delight** - Additional recipes and cooking options
- **End's Delight** - End-themed foods
- **Expanded Delight** - Even more culinary options
- **Botany Pots** - Compact crop growing
- **Let's Do: Beachparty** - Coastal-themed content and food

## 🎨 Quality of Life & Visual Improvements

### Performance Optimization
- **Sodium** - Massive FPS improvements
- **Lithium** - Game logic optimization
- **Starlight** - Lighting engine optimization
- **ModernFix** - Comprehensive fixes and optimizations
- **FerriteCore** - Memory optimization
- **Noisium** - World generation optimization
- **LazyDFU** - Faster game startup
- **BadOptimizations** - Optimizes lightmap updates, sky color calculations, and debug rendering
- **Memory Leak Fix** - Prevents memory leaks
- **FastAnim** - Optimized animations
- **Debugify** - Fixes 70+ vanilla Minecraft bugs

### Visual Enhancements
- **Iris** - Shader support
- **Entity Model Features** & **Entity Texture Features** - Better entity rendering
- **Enhanced Block Entities** - Optimized chest/block entity rendering
- **3D Skin Layers** - 3D player skin layers
- **Continuity** - Connected textures
- **Grass Overhaul** & **BetterGrassify** - Better grass rendering
- **Spawn Animations** - Entities spawn with animations
- **NotEnoughAnimations** - More player animations
- **Sound Physics Remastered** - Realistic sound physics

### Culling & Rendering
- **EntityCulling** - Don't render unseen entities
- **Cull Less Leaves** - Optimized leaf rendering
- **More Culling** - Additional culling improvements
- **Model Gap Fix** - Fixes gaps in block models
- **Cubes Without Borders** - Seamless block connections

### UI Improvements
- **EMI** (Extended Mod Integration) - Modern recipe viewer with extensive integration
  - EMI Enchanting, Enchants, Loot, Ores, Professions, Trades
  - EMIffect - View potion effects
  - EMIzed Botany Pots - Botany Pots integration
  - Emi Tech Reborn - Tech integration
- **Jade** - Advanced tooltip system (what you're looking at)
- **Clean F3** - Cleaner debug screen
- **Dark Loading Screen** - Easy on the eyes
- **Mod Menu** - Manage your mods easily
- **Reese's Sodium Options** - Better Sodium settings UI
- **Minecraft Cursor** - Improved cursor appearance
- **Mod Loading Screen** - Better loading screen
- **Remove Reloading Screen** - Smoother resource pack reloading

### Miscellaneous QoL
- **Zoomify** - Zoom in on distant objects
- **Artifacts** & **Trinkets** - Equipment slots and special items
- **Bartering Station** - Easier piglin bartering
- **Bountiful** - Bounty board quest system
- **Hearths** - Nether biome improvements with new structures (Crimson/Warped Towers)
- **Better Beds** - Improved bed rendering performance
- **Twigs** - Small decorative additions
- **Winterly** - Winter/holiday themed decorations and cosmetics
- **Promenade** - Seasonal and decorative content
- **Yeetus Experimentus** - Disables the experimental settings popup
- **Disable Custom Worlds Advice** - Removes the custom world warning
- **Fast IP Ping** - Faster server list pinging

## 🔧 Technical Foundation

All the mods that make everything work together:
- **Fabric API** & **Fabric Language Kotlin** - Core modding framework
- **Architectury, Balm, Cloth Config, Forge Config API Port** - Cross-platform compatibility
- **GeckoLib 4** - Animation library
- **CoroUtil** - Library for Zombie Awareness and similar mods
- **Resourceful Lib, Puzzles Lib, SuperMartijn642's Config Lib** - Utility libraries
- **YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL), oωo, MidnightLib, Fzzy Config** - Configuration frameworks
- **Kambrik, CorgiLib, Cristel Lib, Dawn API, GlitchCore** - Additional libraries
- **Obscure API, Necronomicon** - Mod support libraries
- **TerraBlender** - Biome blending library
- **Bookshelf, Botarium, Extra Mod Integrations** - Shared functionality
- Plus many more technical libraries ensuring stability

## 📋 Recommended Specs

- **Minimum:** 6GB RAM allocated
- **Recommended:** 8-10GB RAM allocated
- Modern CPU and GPU recommended due to enhanced world generation

## 🎮 Gameplay Tips

1. **Take your time exploring** - There's incredible variety in every direction
2. **Bring a Nature's Compass and Explorer's Compass** - Essential tools for navigation
3. **Set up Waystones early** - The world is massive
4. **Be prepared for tougher mobs** - Vanilla mob behavior has been enhanced
5. **Watch your food supply** - Farmer's Delight adds complexity to cooking

---

**Overrun** isn't just a modpack—it's a complete reimagining of what Minecraft exploration can be. Every journey is unique, every biome is breathtaking, and every structure holds secrets. The world is waiting to be discovered.
